model._note_field_dim: Output channels. ChannelThermal usually 5: u,v,p,omega,T. MultiCylinder usually 4: u,v,p,omega.
model._note_layout: max_num_modules pads layouts; domain/module_radius define geometry units for tokens and bias.
model._note_env_tokens: Centered grid resolution for environment tokens; higher is more spatial capacity and cost.
model._note_num_hyperedges: Main bottleneck size. Test 2,4,6,8 to find minimal useful organization.
model._note_hidden_dim: Token/state width. Test 64,96,128,192 for capacity vs overfit/cost.
model._note_geometry_mode: nonperiodic = channel/walls; periodic = wrapped flow domain.
model._note_query_time_mode: none = steady; phase = periodic tau; physical_time = raw continuous time.
model._note_hyper_geometry_bias: Lets query attend to hyperedges using hyperedge coordinates; still hypergraph-centric.
model._note_auxiliary_paths: A_me is organizer-only auxiliary; direct/near/global test possible decoder shortcuts.
model._note_direct_residual_gate_init: Initial sigmoid gate for direct residual path. 0 keeps shortcut nearly off.

data._note_paths: Existing demo datasets are read in place; they are not copied into this sandbox.

training._note_training: Dry-run first. Increase max steps only after shape/diagnostic checks pass.
